initiatives.name: SURJ Champaign-Urbana
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in the Champaign-Urbana area. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Free Champaign Urbana
initiatives.description: CU mutual aid group primarily focused on resource sharing, monthly food distributions, and community building. Free resources, free people.

initiatives.name: Praire Liberation Center
initiatives.description: Working-class community center based out of Champaign, IL

initiatives.name: Urbana Champaign Forest Defense
initiatives.description: Organizing to Stop Cop City and Defend the Atlanta Forest from the Champaign Urbana area.

initiatives.name: Urbana Champaign Reproductive Justice
initiatives.description: Dedicated to lifting up and solidifying the Urbana-Champaign area's commitment to achieving reproductive justice in all its forms for our community.

initiatives.name: UC Books to Prisoners
initiatives.description: An Urbana Illinois based project providing books to incarcerated individuals in Illinois at no cost by mail as well as through the county jail library which we operate.

initiatives.name: UC Jews For Ceasefire
initiatives.description: We are a multigenerational group of Jews in the Urbana-Champaign area organizing for a permanent and immediate ceasefire in Gaza.
